name: from2001-useful-skills
description: A collection of useful agent skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: translate-pptx
plugins.description: Translate PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations between any language pair while preserving all formatting, layouts, images, and design.

plugins.name: translate-pdf
plugins.description: Translate PDF documents between any language pair while preserving layout, images, and formatting.

plugins.name: review-and-fix-with-multiple-llm
plugins.description: Multi-LLM code review and auto-fix. Runs multiple review skills in parallel, normalizes outputs, aggregates findings by consensus with priority levels and confidence scoring, then fixes validated issues.

plugins.name: nano-banana-infographic
plugins.description: Generate NotebookLM-style infographic images from any topic or data using Gemini API. Produces both English and Japanese versions at 1920x1080 with identical layout.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: Generate a graphic image from any text or topic using Gemini API. A simple, single-image generator for visual summaries and illustrations.
